examples.object_listened_to: Captioned game cutscene with offscreen alarm

heard.statement: The supplied description links an offscreen alarm to a captioned game cutscene.

inferred.statement: The alarm may cue offscreen threat or interface state, but timing requires video/audio inspection.

interpreted.statement: The scene should be read through sound, image, caption, interface, and timing together rather than as audio-only evidence.

undetermined.statement: Frame timing, mix level, caption accuracy, visual content, source, and production intent remain unknown.

examples.object_listened_to: ASR transcript from a voice-agent demo

heard.statement: The supplied input is an ASR-style transcript from a voice-agent demo.

inferred.statement: The text may represent a speech-to-text stage, but it does not verify vocal quality or speaker identity.

interpreted.statement: The voice-agent workflow should separate vocal sound, transcript, model behavior, consent, and access.

undetermined.statement: Prosody, timbre, accent, speaker identity, consent, ASR accuracy, model stack, and dataset provenance remain unknown.

heard.statement: The prompt describes a workflow where alerts are audio-only.

inferred.statement: Users with muted devices, noisy environments, hearing variation, or unavailable speakers may miss alert state changes.
inferred.basis: Design inference from audio-only alert path

interpreted.statement: The workflow implies a default hearing listener and should provide visual, textual, and possibly haptic alternatives.

undetermined.statement: Alert urgency, volume, masking, visual state, haptic support, captioning, user testing, and assistive-technology behavior remain unknown.

examples.object_listened_to: Long feedback tone in a resonant room

heard.statement: The prompt describes a long feedback tone in a resonant room.

inferred.statement: Sustained feedback and room resonance are possible, but frequency, amplitude, and coupling require measurement.

interpreted.statement: The sound can be approached as an event across loudspeaker, room, air, surfaces, and listener body.

undetermined.statement: Actual waveform, frequency, loudness, room dimensions, speaker position, material composition, and bodily effect remain unknown.
undetermined.basis: No measured signal or room data supplied
